Petition For Order To Compel Trustee To Account; Request For Financial Documents; Request For Attorney Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jun-04-2019 Off Calendar

Petition For Order To Compel Trustee To Account; Request For Financial Documents; Request For Attorney Fees And Costs
Off Calendar May-07-2019 Continued To Jun-04-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sheri Hoffman appeared by telephone for Martin Austria.

The Court stated that it is still looking for courtesy copies of the petition and a proposed order. Ms. Hoffman stated that they reached a settlement, that she is waiting for completion of the final terms, that she will be filing a dismissal and that she anticipates doing so within the next seven days. The Petition for Order to Compel Trustee to Account, etc. is continued to June 4, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court is expecting to see a dismissal filed well before then.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
